case_title: PEACOCK JEWELERS INC VS CHAPPLE JOHN

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPPLE JOHN
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-20-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF JAN-16-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER IN THIS MATTER WAS BASED ON THE REQUEST OF BOTH PARTIES TO HAVE THE JUDGMENT ORDERED EXPUNGED BECAUSE THE CASE WAS FILED IN ERROR & SHLD HAVE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $523.02 FILED BY PEACOCK JEWELERS INC AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPPLE JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEACOCK JEWELERS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAPPLE JOHN $523.03 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $564.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT HAVE BEEN FILED IN THE 1ST PLACE. PLFT STATES IN HIS NOTE OF JUNE 2, 1994, THAT THE CASE WAS FILED DUE TO MISUNDERSTANDING ON THEIR PART. IN
IN ADDITION, TERMS OF JUDGMENT WAS FULLY SATISFIED THUS, THIS COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT THE RE- QUEST OF BOTH PLFT & DEFT TO HAVE ORDERED EXPUNGED
JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 2/20/91 IN FAVOR OF PLFT PEACOCK JEWELERS INC. & AGAINST DEFT JOHN CHAPPLE BE EXPUNGED FROM THE RECORDS OF THE COURT. THE CT'
ORDER OF THE COURT TO PEACOCK JEWELRY RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
